name: Spawn Aave Yielder (chaser) g2
description: Swarm-growth spawn: an extra agent funded purely from treasury margin recycled out of culled agents' returned balances (no new outside capital), growing the swarm toward its 13-agent cap. Generation 2 of the "ay-chaser" lineage, spawned from epoch-7 top performer ay-chaser with ±20% mutated parameters. Supply stables to Aave v3, compound, rebalance when APY delta > 13bps; 2.54% reserve

spawn.fitnessFormula: fitness = annualize(V_end/V_start) - gas_penalty; reputation = clamp(round(50 + 500*(fitness - swarm_median)), 0, 100); inputs recomputable from Celoscan
